content: Most LLM-based AI-agent frameworks treat memory as a static, post-hoc retrieval layer, but integrating 2024-2025 SOTA active learning principles into the core memory architecture would let the agent proactively prioritize what to encode, prune, and query instead of passively storing all interaction data. This turns agent memory from a passive storage bucket into an active learning loop that shapes the agent’s future reasoning before it encounters new tasks.
